original_image_tags: Inverted rubber stamp impression, partially legible. Text reads: "RECEIVED... WPA FIELD OFFICE... JUN 15 1953... CONFIDENTIAL".

elements.description: Typed document page containing text paragraphs. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are visible. The page includes a section titled 'Incident MAF 1205 I', a paragraph of text, a line stating '1 Incis Exhibit "A"', and a name 'FRANK M. BROWN, S/A, CIC, SAC AP' at the bottom. The rest of the page contains faint, partially legible stamped or handwritten markings and some redacted or obscured areas, but no distinct visual elements like images or diagrams.
